'''Calfta Bongi''' was the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Head Nurse]] aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
